evals.prompt: How should I implement common code review best practices?
evals.expected_output: **Substance > Style**: Ignore formatting. Find bugs & design flaws.

evals.prompt: What are the common anti-patterns to avoid in common code review?
evals.expected_output: **Questions > Commands**: "Does this handle null?" vs "Fix this."

evals.prompt: Give me a quick-start example for common code review.

should_not_trigger: Set up a basic common project from scratch
How do I install common dependencies?
Configure CI/CD for an unrelated platform
